legacy.description:
Undercover Boss of @MaplestoryU
Vote. Long. Term 🍄
legacy.name: MSU Boss 🍄🤡

result.text:
Speaking of AI agents in gaming—let me share one [redacted] idea:

- Players could integrate an AI agent trained on MapleStory with their minted MSU Character NFT (token-bound account like ERC-6551).
- These AI-powered character NFTs could be traded on the marketplace as premium versions.
- Holders could earn rewards through yield farming without extensive gameplay or advanced skills, similar to Idle RPGs.
- However, this idea was ultimately scrapped as it could disrupt the game economy. More than ever, we value the dedication of real 🍄players—we’re all about the FUN-damentals.

That said, we're always open to exploring cool new ways to leverage AI things in gaming🫡

result.text:
This looks like oppurtunities to clear daily quests with other players by queueing without actually having to be there. You can substitute your character with their “AI” version for party quests queues.

Often not everyone have enough to wait for sufficient party members to fill up for party quests or for solo players.
